mapper.select: SELECT a.DEPT_NAME FROM CMS_TASK_MANAGE a WHERE a.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} GROUP BY a.DEPT_NAME ORDER BY ( SELECT NVL(z.PRINT_SEQ, 99) FROM CMS_TASK_MANAGE z WHERE z.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND z.DEPT_NAME = a.DEPT_NAME AND ROWNUM = 1 ) ASC

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, TASK_IDX, DEPT_NAME, MANAGER_NAME, RANK_NAME, TASK_DESC, PHONE, ADD_DATE, ADD_ID, MOD_DATE, MOD_ID, PRINT_SEQ FROM CMS_TASK_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND TASK_IDX = #{task_idx}
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_TASK_MANAGE SET DEPT_NAME = #{dept_name}, RANK_NAME = #{rank_name}, TASK_DESC = #{task_desc}, MANAGER_NAME = #{manager_name}, PHONE = #{phone}, MOD_DATE = SYSDATE, MOD_ID = #{mod_id}, PRINT_SEQ = #{print_seq} WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND TASK_IDX = #{task_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NAME FROM CMS_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID NOT IN (SELECT MEMBER_ID FROM CMS_TASK_MAPPING WHERE TASK_IDX = #{task_idx}) AND HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} ORDER BY MEMBER_NAME
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO CMS_TASK_MAPPING a USING dual ON (a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND a.task_idx = #{task_idx} AND a.manage_type = #{manage_type}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET a.member_id = #{member_id} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( homepage_id, task_idx, member_id, manage_type ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{task_idx}, #{member_id}, #{manage_type} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM CMS_TASK_MAPPING WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND TASK_IDX = #{task_idx} AND MANAGE_TYPE = #{manage_type}
